title: Swiggy Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Swiggy Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Swiggy Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Swiggy Digital Technologies:
Swiggy Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Digital Technologies!
